steps.title: Name the freezer role
steps.content: The task asks what refrigerants do in freezers. The notes state that freezers use refrigerants to absorb heat and release cold air, with fluoromethane given as an example of a refrigerant.

steps.title: Reject chemistry-only details
steps.content: Choice A describes freezers without naming refrigerants. Choice B gives fluoromethane's chemical composition instead of its function. Choice C mentions phase changes but does not directly state the freezer role. The needed sentence names the role directly. The answer is D.
